creator: ru@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Nov 07, 2006 at 08:47:55PM +0000, Boris Srostlik wrote:
> During boot up just looping re-booting after 1/2 second, can't even see anything re-boot right away.
> 
Please get yourself familiar with the following document:

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/problem-reports/index.html

and try to supply more information.  Otherwise, this PR will likely
get closed for reasons stated at the beginning of the above document.
Since this email to you will bounce (as you mangled your email address
in the Web form), I will close this PR in 3 days if I don't hear back
from you.


Cheers,
-- 
Ruslan Ermilov
ru@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD committer
